title: No More Poison with Regeneration
description: This mod will prevent the endless loop of regenerating then losing health when you are under the effect of both potions.
body:
No More Poison with Regeneration!

Have you ever found yourself under siege by cave spiders, and when you eat that lifesaving golden apple, you're stuck in an endless loop of healing than hurting than healing again? Are you tired of needing to waste **MINUTES** of your life trying to remove that annoying poison effect? If so, then this mod is for you! 

With this mod, if you are under both potion effects, they will cancel each other out, leaving only the potion that would have lasted longer. If both potions had equal duration, they will just cancel each other out.

Feel free to use this in any modpack.
